title: Is it possible to customise the item description automatically populated for form submissions?
excerpt: When someone submits a form response the line item created automatically says ‘Incoming form answer’. Does anyone know how this text can be customised using Monday.com forms?

posts.author: janelegall (Jane)
posts.cookedHtml: When someone submits a form response the line item created automatically says ‘Incoming form answer’. Does anyone know how this text can be customised using Monday.com forms?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @janelegall! The “incoming form answer” line can be replaced in the “Name” question in the form. If you deleted this question, simply add a new form and you’ll see it pop up by default as the first question in your form.

Hope this helps! If you have any further questions, send us an email at support@monday.com!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
